title: cyperus incomtus
intro: Cyperus incomtus, also known as Umhlonyane or Pot of Gold, is a plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) native to Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus incomtus include relief from fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin infections. Cyperus incomtus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots, leaves, and rhizomes are used in traditional medicine.
